articles.title: Princess Sofia Regatta: Kiwis battle through tough Day 4 as medal showdown looms
articles.excerpt: It was another demanding day on the water for New Zealand's sailors at the Princess Sofia Regatta in Palma, with tricky, shifty conditions again testing the fleet.

articles.title: Princess Sofia Regatta: Kiwis still in medal hunt after chaotic start to finals racing
articles.excerpt: Race Results from Day 3 of the Princess Sofia Regatta showing New Zealand sailors competing at the international event.

articles.title: Yachting New Zealand appoints advisory group to lead membership model and affiliation fee review
articles.excerpt: The review into Yachting New Zealand's club membership model and affiliation fee structure has gathered pace with the appointment of a 16-member advisory group.

articles.title: Gautrey, Bilger lead charge as Kiwis shine on Day 2 in Palma
articles.excerpt: New Zealand sailors delivered strong performances on Day 2 of the 2026 Princess Sofia Regatta, with George Gautrey leading the charge after claiming top finishes.

articles.title: 21-strong Kiwi squad set for major test at Palma regatta
articles.excerpt: New Zealand's sailors are preparing for the major international yachting event in Palma with a strong squad competing across multiple classes.

articles.title: A significant step forward: the 2026 Port and Harbour Marine Safety Code
articles.excerpt: For more than two decades, the Port and Harbour Marine Safety Code has been a cornerstone of safe navigation in Aotearoa's busy commercial ports and harbours.

articles.title: Easy ways to avoid oil discharges
articles.excerpt: Vessels can discharge oily water that causes harm to the oceans and rivers we depend on for our livelihoods and wellbeing. Maritime NZ provides guidance on preventing such discharges.

articles.title: Regulatory Amendment Package (RAP) 3 consultation coming soon
articles.excerpt: Maritime NZ will soon consult on Regulatory Amendment Package (RAP) 3, a package of proposed changes to the Maritime Rules and related policy designed to improve safety and support the maritime workforce.
